title.en: Marine Fasteners Guide: Saltwater-Resistant Fasteners for Boat and Marina
title.zh: 海洋紧固件指南：船和码头耐盐水紧固件
title.es: Guía de Sujetadores Marinos: Sujetadores Resistentes al Agua Salada
title.ar: دليل المثبتات البحرية: مثبتات مقاومة للماء المالح
title.fr: Guide des Fixations Marines: Fixations Résistantes à l'Eau Salée
title.pt: Guia de Fixadores Marinhos: Fixadores Resistentes à Água Salgada
title.ru: Руководство по Морскому Крепежу: Крепеж с Устойчивостью к Морской Воде
title.ja: 海洋用ファスナーガイド：塩水耐性ファスナー
title.hi: मैरीन फास्टनर गाइड: नमक के पानी प्रतिरोधी फास्टनर

description.en: Complete guide to marine fasteners. Learn about stainless steel 316, silicon bronze, and hot-dip galvanized fasteners for boats, docks, and marine applications.
description.zh: 海洋紧固件完整指南。了解用于船、码头和海洋应用的316不锈钢、硅青铜和热镀锌紧固件。
description.es: Guía completa de sujetadores marinos. Aprenda sobre acero inoxidable 316, bronce de silicio y sujetadores galvanizados en caliente.
description.ar: دليل شامل للمثبتات البحرية. تعلم عن الفولاذ المقاوم للصدأ 316 والبرونز السيليكوني والمراسي المجلفنة.
description.fr: Guide complet des fixations marines. Apprenez l'acier inoxydable 316, le bronze au silicium et les fixations galvanisées à chaud.
description.pt: Guia completo de fixadores marinhos. Aprenda sobre aço inoxidável 316, bronze de silício e fixadores galvanizados.
description.ru: Полное руководство по морскому крепежу. Узнайте о нержавеющей стали 316, кремниевой бронзе и горячеоцинкованном крепеже.
description.ja: 海洋用ファスナーの完全ガイド。316ステンレススチール、硅青銅、そして熱間亜鉛めっきファスナーについて学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden für Meeres-Befestigungen. Erfahren Sie mehr über Edelstahl 316, Siliziumbronze und feuerverzinkte Befestigungen.
description.hi: मैरीन फास्टनर की पूर्ण गाइड। नाव, डॉक, और समुद्री अनुप्रयोगों के लिए स्टेनलेस स्टील 316, सिलिकॉन ब्रॉन्ज, और हॉट-डिप गैल्वनाइज्ड फास्टनर के बारे में जानें।

keywords: marine fasteners, stainless steel 316, silicon bronze, saltwater resistant, boat fasteners, dock fasteners

body.en:
Marine environments require special materials:

1. Stainless Steel 316:
- Molybdenum addition for chloride resistance
- Best choice for most marine applications
- 18-8 composition with 2-3% molybdenum
- Resists pitting in saltwater

2. Silicon Bronze:
- Copper-silicon alloy
- Traditional boat building material
- Excellent saltwater resistance
- Preferred for below-waterline

3. Hot-Dip Galvanized:
- Steel with heavy zinc coating
- Good for docks and pilings
- Sacrificial protection
- Reasonable cost

Marine fastener applications:

Above Waterline:
- Deck hardware
- Railings
- Cleats and chocks
- Use: Stainless 316 or silicon bronze

Below Waterline:
- Through-hull fittings
- Propeller attachments
- Underwater hardware
- Use: Silicon bronze (traditional) or SS 316

Docks and Piers:
- Framing connections
- Hardware mounting
- Use: Hot-dip galvanized or SS 316

Avoid these materials in marine environments:

1. Stainless Steel 304:
- Prone to pitting in saltwater
- Salt trapped in pits causes rapid corrosion
- Use 316 instead

2. Carbon Steel:
- Rapid rusting in saltwater
- Even with paint/coating
- Failures can be dangerous

3. Aluminum (some alloys):
- Pitting corrosion in saltwater
- Use 6061-T6 or 5086-H32
- Avoid in direct seawater contact
